channel.title: Humor on Andrea Veri's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Humor on Andrea Veri's Blog

item.title: The Linux’s perception of my neighbours
item.description: I live in a little village close to the city and one of the houses close to my property is for rent since more than ten years. A lot of families and people succeeded in that house and every time someone new joined my Linux evangelist hat jumped in my head. I’ve always presented myself as a Linux geek to my neighbours and it has been nice seeing how the Linux word evolved (with funny and surprising quotes) during the past ten years in their minds.
